name: touch-grass
description: A rage detector for Claude Code. When you start yelling, Claude gets anxious.

scripts.reset: echo '{"rageLevel":0,"messageHistory":[],"totalRages":0,"apologies":0,"lastMessageTime":null,"sessionPeak":0,"incidentReports":0}' > ~/.touch-grass/state.json && echo 'Rage meter reset. Claude feels safe again.'

author: Sharbel Ayyoub
